name: Transaction Status Inquiry
description: Standardize bank statement data, cross-reference payer/beneficiary records, and compute total transaction values from CSV/Excel exports.
gemini_prompt: You are an expert banking operations parser. Analyze the provided spreadsheet data matrix. Extract every single valid transaction record row. For each entry, normalize and extract these exact fields: value_date (the date string — strip timezone codes like 'MY', keep the date portion only e.g. '26 May 2026'), ref_no (the transaction reference string), payer_name (string), payer_account_no (string or integer), beneficiary_name (string), amount_myr (extract the clean floating point numeric value from the amount string, stripping currency prefixes like MYR), and status (string). Do not truncate or omit rows.
